---
title: "Education & Experience"
---

## Education

**Doctor of Philosophy (Psychology)**\
RMIT University, 2023 -- present\
*School of Health and Biomedical Sciences*\
Supervisors: Dr Daniel Zarate, Dr Vasileios Stavropoulos, Dr Taylor Brown, Dr Vince Rizzo\
Research focus: Emotionally based school avoidance, EBSA interventions, longitudinal modelling, population-level attendance data

**Master of Professional Psychology**\
Victoria University, 2022 -- present\
*Provisional registration with the Psychology Board of Australia*

**Bachelor of Psychology (Honours)**\
Victoria University\
*First Class Honours*

---

## Academic appointments

### RMIT University
**Sessional Academic** | 2023 -- present\
Teaching and tutoring across undergraduate and postgraduate psychology units. Roles have included tutorial delivery, online student support, marking, and EDA tutorial development for research methods and statistics coursework.

### Cairnmillar Institute
**Associate Lecturer** | 2024 -- present\
Sessional teaching support at honours level, including marking, student feedback, and research methods learning.

---

## Clinical and school-based roles

### CatholicCare Victoria
**Provisional Psychologist** | 2023 -- present\
Practice in an industry-linked context connected to school attendance, student wellbeing, and child and family services. Supervised practice toward general registration.

### Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew
**School Counsellor** | 2024 -- present\
School-based counselling and student wellbeing support at primary level, with a focus on emotional regulation, attendance concerns, and family liaison.

---

## Professional memberships and registrations

- Psychology Board of Australia (provisional registration)
- Australian Psychological Society (APS)

---

## Skills and tools

**Statistical and research software:** R (RStudio), Jamovi, SPSS, Excel, Quarto\
**Methods:** Systematic review, meta-analysis (including meta-MASEM), network analysis, latent growth modelling, growth mixture modelling, longitudinal cohort analysis, administrative data linkage\
**Other:** Academic peer review, research supervision support, curriculum and assessment design
